name: unique-janch-ghar-webhook
description: WhatsApp Business Cloud API webhook for Unique Janch Ghar (diagnostic lab). Runs on Google Cloud Functions Gen 2 (asia-south1). Free-tier strict: free-form replies only, logs to Google Sheet.

scripts.lint:syntax: node --check index.js && node --check src/verify.js && node --check src/router.js && node --check src/keywords.js && node --check src/actions.js && node --check src/sheets.js && node --check src/config.js && node --check src/logger.js

author: Indal KP <indalpatel@gmail.com>
